name: Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonScale
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonScale
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonScale( dword polygonID, dword width, dword height ); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonScale( dbNode implement, dword polygonID, dword width, dword height ); // form 2
description: The function changes the size of a polygon object. A Change Polygon Scale command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: polygonID
parameters.description: Object ID of a polygon object

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the bounding rectangle in pixel

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the bounding rectangle in pixel

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
